targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_predictions
FROM prediction_logs
WHERE predicted_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds};

SELECT
    to_timestamp(floor(predicted_at / 60) * 60) AS time,
    COUNT(*) AS prediction_count
  FROM prediction_logs
  WHERE predicted_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
  GROUP BY 1
  ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
    to_timestamp(floor(predicted_at / 60) * 60) AS time,
    percentile_cont(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS latency_p50_ms,
    percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS latency_p95_ms
  FROM prediction_logs
  WHERE predicted_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
  GROUP BY 1
  ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  runtime_slot,
  model_name,
  model_version,
  model_alias,
  model_run_id,
  threshold,
  COUNT(*) AS prediction_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE predicted_value = 1) AS predicted_fail_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE predicted_value = -1) AS predicted_pass_count,
  MIN(to_timestamp(predicted_at)) AS first_prediction_time,
  MAX(to_timestamp(predicted_at)) AS last_prediction_time
FROM prediction_logs
WHERE predicted_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
GROUP BY runtime_slot, model_name, model_version, model_alias, model_run_id, threshold
ORDER BY prediction_count DESC;

SELECT
  runtime_slot,
  target_alias,
  active_model_version,
  left(active_model_run_id, 8) AS active_run,
  active_threshold,
  previous_model_version,
  left(previous_model_run_id, 8) AS previous_run,
  previous_threshold,
  last_operation,
  to_timestamp(updated_at) AS updated_at
FROM model_runtime_deployment_state
WHERE model_name = 'secom-fail-detector'
ORDER BY CASE runtime_slot
  WHEN 'release' THEN 1
  WHEN 'canary' THEN 2
  WHEN 'shadow' THEN 3
  ELSE 9
END;

SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_predictions,
  COUNT(a.sample_id) AS labeled_predictions,
  ROUND((COUNT(a.sample_id)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)), 4) AS label_coverage,
  ROUND(
    percentile_cont(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY (a.labeled_at - p.predicted_at))
      FILTER (WHERE a.labeled_at IS NOT NULL)::numeric,
    2
  ) AS label_lag_p50_seconds,
  ROUND(
    percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY (a.labeled_at - p.predicted_at))
      FILTER (WHERE a.labeled_at IS NOT NULL)::numeric,
    2
  ) AS label_lag_p95_seconds
FROM prediction_logs p
LEFT JOIN actual_labels a
  ON a.sample_id = p.sample_id
WHERE p.predicted_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds};

WITH active_release AS (
  SELECT
    active_model_run_id,
    active_threshold
  FROM model_runtime_deployment_state
  WHERE model_name = 'secom-fail-detector'
    AND runtime_slot = 'release'
)
SELECT
  m.n_samples AS evaluated_samples,
  m.n_fail_samples AS evaluated_fail_samples
FROM model_metrics m
JOIN active_release r
  ON m.model_run_id = r.active_model_run_id
 AND m.threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM r.active_threshold
WHERE m.metric_name = 'fail_f1'
ORDER BY m.computed_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH active_release AS (
  SELECT
    active_model_run_id,
    active_threshold
  FROM model_runtime_deployment_state
  WHERE model_name = 'secom-fail-detector'
    AND runtime_slot = 'release'
)
SELECT
  m.metric_value AS fail_f1
FROM model_metrics m
JOIN active_release r
  ON m.model_run_id = r.active_model_run_id
 AND m.threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM r.active_threshold
WHERE m.metric_name = 'fail_f1'
ORDER BY m.computed_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH active_release AS (
  SELECT
    active_model_run_id,
    active_threshold
  FROM model_runtime_deployment_state
  WHERE model_name = 'secom-fail-detector'
    AND runtime_slot = 'release'
)
SELECT
  to_timestamp(m.computed_at) AS time,
  m.metric_name AS metric,
  m.metric_value AS value
FROM model_metrics m
JOIN active_release r
  ON m.model_run_id = r.active_model_run_id
 AND m.threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM r.active_threshold
WHERE m.computed_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
  AND m.metric_name = 'fail_f1'
ORDER BY time, metric;

WITH active_release AS (
  SELECT
    active_model_run_id,
    active_threshold
  FROM model_runtime_deployment_state
  WHERE model_name = 'secom-fail-detector'
    AND runtime_slot = 'release'
)
SELECT
  to_timestamp(m.computed_at) AS time,
  m.metric_name AS metric,
  m.metric_value AS value
FROM model_metrics m
JOIN active_release r
  ON m.model_run_id = r.active_model_run_id
 AND m.threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM r.active_threshold
WHERE m.computed_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
  AND m.metric_name = 'fail_recall'
ORDER BY time, metric;

WITH active_release AS (
  SELECT
    active_model_run_id,
    active_threshold
  FROM model_runtime_deployment_state
  WHERE model_name = 'secom-fail-detector'
    AND runtime_slot = 'release'
)
SELECT
  to_timestamp(m.computed_at) AS time,
  m.metric_name AS metric,
  m.metric_value AS value
FROM model_metrics m
JOIN active_release r
  ON m.model_run_id = r.active_model_run_id
 AND m.threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM r.active_threshold
WHERE m.computed_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
  AND m.metric_name = 'fail_precision'
ORDER BY time, metric;

WITH active_release AS (
  SELECT
    active_model_run_id,
    active_threshold
  FROM model_runtime_deployment_state
  WHERE model_name = 'secom-fail-detector'
    AND runtime_slot = 'release'
),
latest_eval AS (
  SELECT m.evaluation_id
  FROM model_metrics m
  JOIN active_release r
    ON m.model_run_id = r.active_model_run_id
   AND m.threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM r.active_threshold
  WHERE m.metric_name = 'fail_f1'
  ORDER BY m.computed_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  m.metric_name,
  m.metric_value,
  m.n_samples,
  m.n_fail_samples,
  m.model_run_id,
  m.threshold,
  to_timestamp(m.computed_at) AS computed_time
FROM model_metrics m
JOIN latest_eval e
  ON e.evaluation_id = m.evaluation_id
WHERE m.metric_name IN (
  'accuracy',
  'fail_precision',
  'fail_recall',
  'fail_f1',
  'pr_auc'
)
ORDER BY CASE m.metric_name
  WHEN 'fail_f1' THEN 1
  WHEN 'fail_recall' THEN 2
  WHEN 'fail_precision' THEN 3
  WHEN 'pr_auc' THEN 4
  WHEN 'accuracy' THEN 5
  ELSE 99
END;

WITH active_release AS (
  SELECT
    active_model_run_id,
    active_threshold
  FROM model_runtime_deployment_state
  WHERE model_name = 'secom-fail-detector'
    AND runtime_slot = 'release'
),
latest_eval AS (
  SELECT m.evaluation_id
  FROM model_metrics m
  JOIN active_release r
    ON m.model_run_id = r.active_model_run_id
   AND m.threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM r.active_threshold
  WHERE m.metric_name = 'fail_f1'
  ORDER BY m.computed_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  m.metric_name,
  m.metric_value::INTEGER AS count
FROM model_metrics m
JOIN latest_eval e
  ON e.evaluation_id = m.evaluation_id
WHERE m.metric_name IN (
  'true_negative',
  'false_positive',
  'false_negative',
  'true_positive'
)
ORDER BY CASE m.metric_name
  WHEN 'true_negative' THEN 1
  WHEN 'false_positive' THEN 2
  WHEN 'false_negative' THEN 3
  WHEN 'true_positive' THEN 4
END;

WITH active_release AS (
  SELECT
    active_model_run_id,
    active_threshold
  FROM model_runtime_deployment_state
  WHERE model_name = 'secom-fail-detector'
    AND runtime_slot = 'release'
),
predicted AS (
  SELECT
    floor(p.predicted_at / 60) * 60 AS bucket,
    SUM(CASE WHEN p.predicted_value = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::DOUBLE PRECISION
      / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS predicted_fail_ratio
  FROM prediction_logs p
  JOIN active_release r
    ON p.model_run_id = r.active_model_run_id
   AND p.threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM r.active_threshold
  WHERE p.predicted_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
    AND p.runtime_slot = 'release'
  GROUP BY 1
),
actual AS (
  SELECT
    floor(p.predicted_at / 60) * 60 AS bucket,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.actual_value = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::DOUBLE PRECISION
      / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS actual_fail_ratio
  FROM prediction_logs p
  JOIN active_release r
    ON p.model_run_id = r.active_model_run_id
   AND p.threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM r.active_threshold
  JOIN actual_labels a
    ON a.sample_id = p.sample_id
  WHERE p.predicted_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
    AND p.runtime_slot = 'release'
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
  to_timestamp(COALESCE(p.bucket, a.bucket)) AS time,
  p.predicted_fail_ratio,
  a.actual_fail_ratio
FROM predicted p
FULL OUTER JOIN actual a ON a.bucket = p.bucket
ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Predicted vs Actual Fail Ratio - Active Release

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    to_timestamp(floor(predicted_at / 60) * 60) AS time,
    predicted_label AS metric,
    COUNT(*) AS value
  FROM prediction_logs
  WHERE predicted_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
  GROUP BY 1, 2
  ORDER BY 1, 2;

WITH release_state AS (
  SELECT
    active_model_run_id,
    active_threshold,
    previous_model_run_id,
    previous_threshold
  FROM model_runtime_deployment_state
  WHERE model_name = 'secom-fail-detector'
    AND runtime_slot = 'release'
),
latest AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (m.model_run_id, m.threshold, m.metric_name)
    m.model_run_id,
    m.threshold,
    m.metric_name,
    m.metric_value,
    m.n_samples,
    m.n_fail_samples,
    m.computed_at
  FROM model_metrics m
  WHERE m.metric_name IN ('fail_f1', 'fail_recall', 'fail_precision', 'pr_auc', 'accuracy')
  ORDER BY m.model_run_id, m.threshold, m.metric_name, m.computed_at DESC
),
active AS (
  SELECT l.*
  FROM latest l
  JOIN release_state r
    ON l.model_run_id = r.active_model_run_id
   AND l.threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM r.active_threshold
),
previous AS (
  SELECT l.*
  FROM latest l
  JOIN release_state r
    ON l.model_run_id = r.previous_model_run_id
   AND l.threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM r.previous_threshold
)
SELECT
  a.metric_name,
  a.metric_value AS active_value,
  p.metric_value AS previous_value,
  a.metric_value - p.metric_value AS delta,
  a.n_samples AS active_samples,
  a.n_fail_samples AS active_fail_samples,
  to_timestamp(a.computed_at) AS active_computed_at
FROM active a
LEFT JOIN previous p
  ON p.metric_name = a.metric_name
ORDER BY
  CASE a.metric_name
    WHEN 'fail_f1' THEN 1
    WHEN 'fail_recall' THEN 2
    WHEN 'fail_precision' THEN 3
    WHEN 'pr_auc' THEN 4
    WHEN 'accuracy' THEN 5
    ELSE 99
  END;

panels.title: Active vs Previous Release - Latest Delta

targets.rawSql:
WITH release_state AS (
  SELECT
    active_model_run_id,
    active_threshold,
    previous_model_run_id,
    previous_threshold
  FROM model_runtime_deployment_state
  WHERE model_name = 'secom-fail-detector'
    AND runtime_slot = 'release'
),
selected AS (
  SELECT
    active_model_run_id AS model_run_id,
    active_threshold AS threshold,
    'active' AS model_slot
  FROM release_state

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    previous_model_run_id AS model_run_id,
    previous_threshold AS threshold,
    'previous' AS model_slot
  FROM release_state
  WHERE previous_model_run_id IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  to_timestamp(m.computed_at) AS time,
  s.model_slot || ' / fail_f1' AS metric,
  m.metric_value AS value
FROM model_metrics m
JOIN selected s
  ON m.model_run_id = s.model_run_id
 AND m.threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM s.threshold
WHERE m.computed_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
  AND m.metric_name = 'fail_f1'
ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: Active vs Previous Release - F1 Trend

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest AS (
    SELECT evaluation_id
    FROM drift_metrics
    WHERE window_type = 'fixed_reference_time_window'
      AND computed_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
    ORDER BY computed_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  )
  SELECT
    d.reference_baseline_id AS baseline_id,
    b.baseline_name AS baseline,
    d.model_run_id AS run_id,
    d.threshold,
    d.window_minutes AS window_min,
    MAX(to_timestamp(d.computed_at)) AS computed_at,
    MAX(to_timestamp(d.current_start)) AS current_start,
    MAX(to_timestamp(d.current_end)) AS current_end,
    MAX(d.current_samples) AS current_n,
    MAX(d.baseline_samples) AS baseline_n,
    COUNT(*) AS metric_rows
  FROM drift_metrics d
  JOIN latest l
    ON l.evaluation_id = d.evaluation_id
  LEFT JOIN drift_reference_baselines b
    ON b.baseline_id = d.reference_baseline_id
  GROUP BY
    d.reference_baseline_id,
    b.baseline_name,
    d.model_run_id,
    d.threshold,
    d.window_minutes;

SELECT
    to_timestamp(computed_at) AS time,
    metric_name,
    delta_value AS value
  FROM drift_metrics
  WHERE computed_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
    AND window_type = 'fixed_reference_time_window'
    AND metric_family = 'output'
    AND metric_name IN (
      'predicted_fail_ratio',
      'fail_probability_avg',
      'fail_probability_p50',
      'fail_probability_p95'
    )
  ORDER BY time, metric_name;

SELECT
    to_timestamp(computed_at) AS time,
    metric_name,
    delta_value AS value
  FROM drift_metrics
  WHERE computed_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
    AND window_type = 'fixed_reference_time_window'
    AND metric_family = 'input'
    AND metric_name IN (
      'missing_count_avg',
      'missing_count_p95',
      'missing_count_max'
    )
  ORDER BY time, metric_name;

SELECT
    feature_name AS feature,
    ROUND(metric_value::numeric, 6) AS psi,
    baseline_samples AS baseline_n,
    current_samples AS current_n,
    to_timestamp(computed_at) AS computed_at
  FROM drift_metrics
  WHERE evaluation_id = (
    SELECT evaluation_id
    FROM drift_metrics
    WHERE window_type = 'fixed_reference_time_window'
      AND metric_family = 'feature'
      AND metric_name = 'feature_psi'
      AND computed_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
    ORDER BY computed_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  )
    AND window_type = 'fixed_reference_time_window'
    AND metric_family = 'feature'
    AND metric_name = 'feature_psi'
  ORDER BY metric_value DESC NULLS LAST
  LIMIT 30;

SELECT
    feature_name AS feature,
    ROUND(metric_value::numeric, 6) AS z_delta,
    ROUND(baseline_value::numeric, 6) AS baseline_mean,
    ROUND(current_value::numeric, 6) AS current_mean,
    ROUND(delta_value::numeric, 6) AS raw_delta,
    baseline_samples AS baseline_n,
    current_samples AS current_n,
    to_timestamp(computed_at) AS computed_at
  FROM drift_metrics
  WHERE evaluation_id = (
    SELECT evaluation_id
    FROM drift_metrics
    WHERE window_type = 'fixed_reference_time_window'
      AND metric_family = 'feature'
      AND metric_name = 'feature_mean_standardized_delta'
      AND computed_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
    ORDER BY computed_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  )
    AND window_type = 'fixed_reference_time_window'
    AND metric_family = 'feature'
    AND metric_name = 'feature_mean_standardized_delta'
  ORDER BY metric_value DESC NULLS LAST

panels.title: Fixed Reference Top Feature Mean Shift

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    feature_name AS feature,
    ROUND(metric_value::numeric, 6) AS abs_delta,
    ROUND(baseline_value::numeric, 6) AS baseline_missing,
    ROUND(current_value::numeric, 6) AS current_missing,
    ROUND(delta_value::numeric, 6) AS signed_delta,
    baseline_samples AS baseline_n,
    current_samples AS current_n,
    to_timestamp(computed_at) AS computed_at
  FROM drift_metrics
  WHERE evaluation_id = (
    SELECT evaluation_id
    FROM drift_metrics
    WHERE window_type = 'fixed_reference_time_window'
      AND metric_family = 'feature'
      AND metric_name = 'feature_missing_ratio_abs_delta'
      AND computed_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
    ORDER BY computed_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  )
    AND window_type = 'fixed_reference_time_window'
    AND metric_family = 'feature'
    AND metric_name = 'feature_missing_ratio_abs_delta'
  ORDER BY metric_value DESC NULLS LAST
  LIMIT 30;

panels.title: Fixed Reference Top Feature Missing Shift
Drift / Data Quality - Recent vs Previous

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (window_type)
    window_type,
    evaluation_id,
    computed_at
  FROM drift_metrics
  ORDER BY window_type, computed_at DESC
)
SELECT
  d.window_type,
  d.metric_family,
  d.metric_name,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  MAX(to_timestamp(d.computed_at)) AS latest_computed_time,
  MAX(d.current_samples) AS current_samples,
  MAX(d.baseline_samples) AS baseline_samples
FROM drift_metrics d
JOIN latest l
  ON l.evaluation_id = d.evaluation_id
GROUP BY d.window_type, d.metric_family, d.metric_name
ORDER BY d.window_type, d.metric_family, d.metric_name;

SELECT
  to_timestamp(computed_at) AS time,
  metric_name,
  current_value AS value
FROM drift_metrics
WHERE computed_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
  AND window_type = 'recent_vs_previous_time_window'
  AND metric_family = 'input'
  AND metric_name IN (
    'missing_count_avg',
    'missing_count_p95',
    'missing_count_max'
  )
ORDER BY time, metric_name;

SELECT
  to_timestamp(computed_at) AS time,
  metric_name,
  current_value AS value
FROM drift_metrics
WHERE computed_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
  AND window_type = 'recent_vs_previous_time_window'
  AND metric_family = 'output'
  AND metric_name IN (
    'fail_probability_avg',
    'fail_probability_p50',
    'fail_probability_p95'
  )
ORDER BY time, metric_name;

SELECT
  feature_name,
  ROUND(metric_value::numeric, 6) AS abs_null_ratio_delta,
  ROUND(baseline_value::numeric, 6) AS baseline_null_ratio,
  ROUND(current_value::numeric, 6) AS current_null_ratio,
  ROUND(delta_value::numeric, 6) AS null_ratio_delta,
  baseline_samples,
  current_samples,
  to_timestamp(computed_at) AS computed_time
FROM drift_metrics
WHERE evaluation_id = (
  SELECT evaluation_id
  FROM drift_metrics
  WHERE window_type = 'recent_vs_previous_time_window'
    AND metric_family = 'feature'
    AND metric_name = 'feature_missing_ratio_abs_delta'
    AND computed_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
  ORDER BY computed_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
  AND window_type = 'recent_vs_previous_time_window'
  AND metric_family = 'feature'
  AND metric_name = 'feature_missing_ratio_abs_delta'
ORDER BY metric_value DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 30;

panels.title: Recent vs Previous Top Feature Missing Shift

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  feature_name,
  ROUND(metric_value::numeric, 6) AS standardized_mean_delta,
  ROUND(baseline_value::numeric, 6) AS baseline_mean,
  ROUND(current_value::numeric, 6) AS current_mean,
  ROUND(delta_value::numeric, 6) AS mean_delta,
  baseline_samples,
  current_samples,
  to_timestamp(computed_at) AS computed_time
FROM drift_metrics
WHERE evaluation_id = (
  SELECT evaluation_id
  FROM drift_metrics
  WHERE window_type = 'recent_vs_previous_time_window'
    AND metric_family = 'feature'
    AND metric_name = 'feature_mean_standardized_delta'
    AND computed_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
  ORDER BY computed_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
  AND window_type = 'recent_vs_previous_time_window'
  AND metric_family = 'feature'
  AND metric_name = 'feature_mean_standardized_delta'
ORDER BY metric_value DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 30;

panels.title: Recent vs Previous Top Feature Mean Shift

targets.rawSql:
WITH selected_model AS (
  SELECT
    split_part('${model_run:raw}', '|', 1) AS model_run_id,
    NULLIF(split_part('${model_run:raw}', '|', 2), 'null')::DOUBLE PRECISION AS threshold
)
SELECT
  to_timestamp(m.computed_at) AS time,
  m.metric_name AS metric,
  m.metric_value AS value
FROM model_metrics m
JOIN selected_model s
  ON m.model_run_id = s.model_run_id
 AND m.threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM s.threshold
WHERE m.computed_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
  AND m.metric_name IN (${metric:sqlstring})
ORDER BY time, metric;

SELECT
  runtime_slot,
  model_run_id,
  threshold,
  COUNT(*) AS prediction_count,
  MIN(to_timestamp(predicted_at)) AS first_prediction_time,
  MAX(to_timestamp(predicted_at)) AS last_prediction_time
FROM prediction_logs
WHERE predicted_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
GROUP BY runtime_slot, model_run_id, threshold
ORDER BY prediction_count DESC;

SELECT
    window_id,
    to_timestamp(window_start) AS window_start,
    to_timestamp(window_end) AS window_end,
    evaluation_status,
    n_samples,
    n_fail_samples,
    accuracy,
    fail_precision,
    fail_recall,
    fail_f1,
    pr_auc,
    true_negative,
    false_positive,
    false_negative,
    true_positive
  FROM model_quality_windows
  ORDER BY window_end DESC
  LIMIT 20;

SELECT
    to_timestamp(window_end) AS time,
    accuracy,
    fail_precision,
    fail_recall,
    fail_f1,
    pr_auc
  FROM model_quality_windows
  WHERE window_end BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
    AND evaluation_status = 'ok'
  ORDER BY time;

WITH latest AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM model_quality_windows
    WHERE evaluation_status = 'ok'
    ORDER BY window_end DESC
    LIMIT 1
  )
  SELECT 'true_negative' AS bucket, true_negative AS count FROM latest
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'false_positive', false_positive FROM latest
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'false_negative', false_negative FROM latest
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'true_positive', true_positive FROM latest;

list.definition:
WITH combos AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    model_run_id,
    threshold
  FROM model_metrics
),
runtime AS (
  SELECT
    runtime_slot,
    active_model_run_id,
    active_threshold
  FROM model_runtime_deployment_state
  WHERE model_name = 'secom-fail-detector'
),
annotated AS (
  SELECT
    c.model_run_id,
    c.threshold,
    string_agg(
      r.runtime_slot,
      ',' ORDER BY CASE r.runtime_slot
        WHEN 'release' THEN 1
        WHEN 'canary' THEN 2
        WHEN 'shadow' THEN 3
        ELSE 9
      END
    ) FILTER (WHERE r.runtime_slot IS NOT NULL) AS runtime_slots
  FROM combos c
  LEFT JOIN runtime r
    ON r.active_model_run_id = c.model_run_id
   AND r.active_threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM c.threshold
  GROUP BY c.model_run_id, c.threshold
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(
    runtime_slots || ' / run=' || left(model_run_id, 8) || ' / th=' || COALESCE(threshold::text, 'null'),
    'run=' || left(model_run_id, 8) || ' / th=' || COALESCE(threshold::text, 'null')
  ) AS __text,
  model_run_id || '|' || COALESCE(threshold::text, 'null') AS __value
FROM annotated
ORDER BY
  CASE
    WHEN runtime_slots LIKE '%release%' THEN 0
    WHEN runtime_slots LIKE '%canary%' THEN 1
    WHEN runtime_slots LIKE '%shadow%' THEN 2
    ELSE 3
  END,
  __text;
list.label: Model run / threshold
list.name: model_run
list.query:
WITH combos AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    model_run_id,
    threshold
  FROM model_metrics
),
runtime AS (
  SELECT
    runtime_slot,
    active_model_run_id,
    active_threshold
  FROM model_runtime_deployment_state
  WHERE model_name = 'secom-fail-detector'
),
annotated AS (
  SELECT
    c.model_run_id,
    c.threshold,
    string_agg(
      r.runtime_slot,
      ',' ORDER BY CASE r.runtime_slot
        WHEN 'release' THEN 1
        WHEN 'canary' THEN 2
        WHEN 'shadow' THEN 3
        ELSE 9
      END
    ) FILTER (WHERE r.runtime_slot IS NOT NULL) AS runtime_slots
  FROM combos c
  LEFT JOIN runtime r
    ON r.active_model_run_id = c.model_run_id
   AND r.active_threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM c.threshold
  GROUP BY c.model_run_id, c.threshold
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(
    runtime_slots || ' / run=' || left(model_run_id, 8) || ' / th=' || COALESCE(threshold::text, 'null'),
    'run=' || left(model_run_id, 8) || ' / th=' || COALESCE(threshold::text, 'null')
  ) AS __text,
  model_run_id || '|' || COALESCE(threshold::text, 'null') AS __value
FROM annotated
ORDER BY
  CASE
    WHEN runtime_slots LIKE '%release%' THEN 0
    WHEN runtime_slots LIKE '%canary%' THEN 1
    WHEN runtime_slots LIKE '%shadow%' THEN 2
    ELSE 3
  END,
  __text;
